headlines.headline: Orevex Renewables secures $800M contract with a national infrastructure agency

sentiment.reasoning: A 20% margin improvement is a strong indicator of increased profitability and operational efficiency.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
